seoTitle: How to Link Confluence With Jira (2026 Tutorial)
metaDescription: Connect Confluence and Jira so pages stay synced with issue data, using space shortcuts, inline macros, Smart Links, and text-to-issue creation.
intro: When your documentation and your tracking board live in separate silos, requirements drift out of sync with what's actually being built. This guide covers linking a Confluence space to a Jira project, embedding live issue macros on a page, and creating new Jira tickets directly from highlighted text.

steps.heading: Connect your space to Jira
steps.body: Open your target Jira project, go to the left sidebar, and click the Pages tab, then click Connect to Confluence and select your specific space.

steps.heading: Add sidebar shortcuts
steps.body: Use Add Shortcut to cross-link navigation URLs directly between your Jira project and Confluence space sidebars.

steps.heading: Embed live issue macros
steps.body: Open a Confluence page, type /jira, and select the filter macro to load live issue feeds directly onto the page.

steps.heading: Create issues from text
steps.body: Highlight text on a published page and click the pop-up ticket icon to create a Jira task without switching tabs.

steps.heading: Verify the documentation links
steps.body: Move to the right sidebar view inside Jira to confirm the automatic documentation links are showing up correctly.

steps.heading: Review linked roadmaps
steps.body: Access the global filters bar to review embedded roadmap calendars tied to your linked projects.

faq.question: Does linking Confluence and Jira update in real time?
faq.answer: Yes, the connection is designed to handle bidirectional synchronization, so page tables update as ticket parameters change in Jira.

faq.question: Can I turn highlighted text into a Jira ticket directly?
faq.answer: Yes, highlighting text on a published Confluence page and clicking the pop-up ticket icon lets you launch a floating ticket creation drawer without leaving the page.

faq.question: What's the difference between a Jira macro and a Smart Link?
faq.answer: A macro like the filter block pulls in structured issue data such as lists or charts, while a Smart Link lets you drop in a raw Jira URL and choose how it displays, such as a card or inline preview.

faq.question: Do I need admin access to connect a Confluence space to Jira?
faq.answer: You typically need appropriate permissions on both the Jira project and Confluence space to set up the connection.
